issues.description: Vision says first install < 5 minutes on M4 Mac, PRD M1 relaxes to < 10 minutes
issues.from_item: Success criteria: npx agentic-service 在 M4 Mac 上 5 分钟内完成首次安装 + 启动
issues.to_item: M1 acceptance: 首次安装（含模型下载）< 10 分钟

issues.description: Vision mentions 'dynamic configuration — remote profiles.json with auto-recommend on model updates' as a core feature, but PRD only covers config hot-update in M4 without specifying auto-recommendation on new model releases
issues.from_item: Core feature 5: 动态配置 — 远程 profiles.json，模型更新后自动推荐新配置
issues.to_item: M4 feature 2: watchProfiles() 每 30s 轮询，ETag 条件获取 — covers hot-update but not auto-recommendation on model updates

issues.description: PRD M3 adds memory module (vector embedding search) which is not mentioned in Vision core features
issues.from_item: Vision does not mention memory/vector search as a core feature
issues.to_item: M3 feature 6: KV 存储 + 向量嵌入 via agentic-store + agentic-embed

issues.description: PRD specifies latency-log.js with record()/p95()/reset() API, Architecture documents record(stage, ms)/p95(stage)/reset() — Architecture adds a 'stage' parameter not in PRD
issues.from_item: PRD: latency-log.js 提供 record()、p95()、reset() 用于延迟统计
issues.to_item: Architecture: latencyLog.record(stage, ms), latencyLog.p95(stage), latencyLog.reset() — adds 'stage' parameter

issues.description: PRD REST API table lists GET /api/devices as a dedicated endpoint, Architecture api.js route listing omits it (device info is embedded in GET /api/status instead)
issues.from_item: PRD REST API: GET /api/devices — 返回已连接设备列表
issues.to_item: Architecture server/api.js routes list omits /api/devices; GET /api/status returns device info as part of status payload

issues.description: Architecture config.js adds 'code' capability slot not defined in PRD CAPABILITIES list
issues.to_item: Architecture config.js: 能力槽: chat, code, vision, embedding, stt, tts — adds 'code' slot

issues.description: 342 cancelled tasks vs 267 done tasks — high cancellation rate indicates significant rework cycles across many components (Docker, agentic-sense, optimizer.js, VAD). All components now covered by at least one completed task.
issues.from_item: Architecture: clean module boundaries for all components
issues.to_item: Task history: 342 cancelled, 267 done — many components have 3-5 cancelled variants before successful completion

issues.description: Architecture known limitation #5 mentions memory.js full-scan performance concern, but no task addresses approximate nearest neighbor indexing or search optimization
issues.from_item: Architecture known limitation: runtime/memory.js 全量扫描 — search() 遍历所有条目计算余弦相似度
issues.to_item: No task for memory.js search performance optimization
